headline: The Zacks Analyst Blog Highlights Marsh & McLennan, American International, American Financial and Accelerant
summary: American International, American Financial and Accelerant are highlighted as insurance stocks benefiting from underwriting strength, pricing power and industry trends.

headline: AIG Appoints Nancy Bewlay as Global Chief Underwriting Officer
summary: NEW YORK, July 01, 2026--American International Group, Inc. (NYSE: AIG) today announced that Nancy Bewlay has been named Executive Vice President, Global Chief Underwriting Officer, effective September 8, 2026. Ms. Bewlay will report to Eric Andersen, President & Chief Executive Officer of AIG, and join the Company’s Executive Leadership Team. She will be based in New York.
